items.title: Reliable fulfillment

items.description: FDA Gear cases coded for audit trails — critical for food and pharmaceutical environments.

items.title: Dedicated support
items.description: Real people in West Chicago — not a ticket queue. Call, email, or request a formal quote.

heritage.headline: West Chicago roots. Nationwide reach.
heritage.body: For nearly three decades, ESM Products has supplied case-quantity PPE to procurement teams who need reliable stock, transparent pricing, and a supplier that answers the phone. From our West Chicago warehouse, we serve food processors, healthcare systems, and industrial operators across the country.

fdaGearSpotlight.headline: Audit-ready apparel for regulated environments
fdaGearSpotlight.description: Our FDA Gear line is engineered for food processing, cleanrooms, and USDA-inspected facilities. Every case is lot-coded for traceability — because your auditor will ask.

industrySolutions.name: Food Processing
industrySolutions.description: Hairnets, beard covers, nitrile gloves, and gowns for HACCP and SQF programs.

industrySolutions.name: Healthcare
industrySolutions.description: Masks, gloves, and isolation gowns for clinics, labs, and long-term care.

industrySolutions.name: Industrial
industrySolutions.description: Cut-resistant and chemical-resistant hand protection for manufacturing floors.

industrySolutions.name: Government
industrySolutions.description: WBE-certified supplier for municipal, state, and federal procurement.

testimonials.quote: ESM is our go-to for nitrile gloves and bouffants. Cases ship next day and lot numbers are always documented for our SQF audits.
testimonials.author: Maria Chen

testimonials.quote: Switching to ESM cut our PPE spend by 12% without changing specs. Their tier pricing is transparent — no surprise invoices.
testimonials.author: James Whitfield

testimonials.quote: As a WBE supplier, ESM helps us meet diversity spend targets while delivering consistent quality across six product categories.
testimonials.author: Angela Torres

sustainability.headline: Responsible sourcing, practical sustainability
sustainability.subheadline: We prioritize suppliers who meet recognized standards and work continuously to reduce packaging waste across our case shipments.

points.title: Reduced packaging waste
points.description: Case packs optimized to minimize void fill and excess corrugated on every shipment.

points.title: Material transparency
points.description: Specification sheets document material composition for every SKU in our catalog.

points.title: Regional distribution
points.description: West Chicago hub reduces transit miles for Midwest and Great Lakes customers.
